\```plaintext
//docs/handbook/methodology/lean-ai-accelerated-methodology.md

Status: Reformatted the “Sources (select)” lines into a readable blockquoted bullet list.

Edits applied (lines 5–6 → expanded list):
> **Sources (select)**
>
> - OWASP **ASVS** (v5.0.0 / 4.0.3)
> - **NIST SSDF** (SP 800‑218)
> - **Google SRE** (SLIs/SLOs, error budgets, postmortems)
> - **DORA** metrics
> - **Trunk‑Based Development**
> - **12‑Factor App**
> - **Hexagonal architecture**
> - **Kanban/Little’s Law**
> - **Shape Up**
> - **Turborepo** (caching/monorepo/Vercel)
> - **Vercel** (previews, envs, promote/rollback, feature flags, cron)
> - **CodeQL/Semgrep**
> - **GitHub** (branch protection, CODEOWNERS, secret scanning)
> - **OTel** (Next.js + Node)
> - **Playwright/Pact/Schemathesis**
> - **OWASP cheat sheets** (CSP/CSRF/SSRF)
> - Citations are sprinkled where load‑bearing.

Summary:
- Converted the comma-separated sources into a clear, scannable list while preserving the blockquote style.
- Added a blockquoted blank line after the heading to satisfy common markdown linting for lists.
\```
